description_long: This is a mechanical clock with a visible gear mechanism and a wooden frame, mounted on a square base. The clock features a large circular face with Roman numerals and exposed gears at its center, giving it a vintage or steampunk appearance. Two weights are suspended from a horizontal bar at the top, likely serving as part of the clock's timekeeping mechanism. The back reveals additional gears and a winding handle, suggesting manual operation. The wood is light in color, and the clock face is bordered with a pale ring, while the gears and some internal components appear metallic. The overall construction is intricate, with several moving parts and decorative finials on top.
description: A vintage-style mechanical clock with a wooden frame, exposed gears, and a circular face with Roman numerals. It features suspended weights and a winding handle, giving it a classic, intricate appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden frame, exposed gears, and the vertical alignment of the mechanism.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular clock face with Roman numerals, central gears, and the two suspended weights above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the winding handle and more of the internal gear structure.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the back of the clock face, the winding mechanism, and the supporting structure for the weights.
attribute_face_design: Circular face with Roman numerals, exposed central gears, and a pale border ring; the design is open and mechanical.
